case_title: KORMAN, BOB vs. BATARA, LELAND, CSR

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KORMAN, BOB ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BATARA, LELAND, CSR
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KORMAN, BOB BATARA, LELAND, CSR

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN: PARTIES APPEARED IN DEPT 1 FROM DEPT 2 ON PLTF'S EX-PARTE MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT UPON STIPULATION. PARTIES REACHED NEW SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH WAS READ INTO THE RECORD WITH REPORTER ONLY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATARA, LELAND, CSR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2021 CALIFORNIA STREET #101, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-30-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED THROUGH 11:59PM ON 5-30-97. NO FURTHER STAYS & WAIVER OF HABITABILITY CLAIMS BY DEFT. IF DFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF MAY APPLY EX-PARTE W/24HRS NOTICE TO DEFT COUNSEL UPON DECLARATION TO LIFT STAY. MONEY JUDGMNT TO BE PAID ON INSTALL; SEE JUDGMNT FOR ALL TERMS & CONDITIONS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
